DISCOVERY 301, PLAINTIFF SEVAN KEVORKIAN MOVES TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIFIED REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND FOR SANCTIONS. FOR THE REASONS STATED HEREIN THE MOTION IS LARGELY DENIED AND THE COURT ORDERS KEVORKIAN TO PAY SANCTIONS TO THE COURT. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Set For Trial On Aug-17-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF SEVAN KEVORKIAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS [ADDED FOR POSTING OF PART 2 OF 2 OF THE TENTATIVE RULING.]
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SEVAN KEVORKIAN's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Plaintiff Sevan Kevorkian moves to compel further responses to specified requests for production of documents and for sanctions. For the reasons stated herein the motion is largely denied and the court orders Kevorkian to pay sanctions to the court.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
